step_rationale: Sphingolipid accumulation in myocardial I/R injury indicating lipid dysmetabolism.
mechanism: Sphingolipid accumulating in myocardial ischemia-reperfusion injury and cardiomyocyte death.

references.title: Spatial Metabolomics Reveals GLA-Mediated Imbalance of GalCer/GalCer as a Therapeutic Target in Myocardial Ischemia-Reperfusion Injury.
references.journal: FASEB journal : official publication of the Federation of American Societies for Experimental Biology
